description:
She made cookies for Adrien only for Chloe to trip her and stomp them down.

Marinette was so excited to bring pastries to Adrien's party until Chloe tripped her. The sweets fell from the box and Chloe decided to stomp them down and laugh. She was so ashamed she ran to hide in one of Adrien's bathrooms alone. (TW: I made her French n blasian)
